      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/technology/ai-kill-switch-act-us-ai-shutdown-law-rogue-models-explained-19953561.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[The proposed US legislation seeks to create an emergency control framework for some of the world's most powerful artificial intelligence systems.
